_textJa:
- group power bonus remains inactive 期間 演唱會s.
- When multiple bonuses can be applied 至 成員，only bonus 與 largest effect is applied.
- When multiple 成員 於 unit have "成員+" bonus，both bonus 的 成員 與 largest effect on group power 與 bonus 的 成員 與 largest effect on event points can each be activated.
*For group power "成員+" bonuses，only bonus 的 single 成員 與 highest effect value 當 "成員+" bonus is multiplied 透過 group power will be activated.
*For event point "成員+" bonuses，only single 成員 與 highest effect value on event points will be activated.
*It is possible 至 activate both group power 與 event point "成員+" bonuses if they are on different 成員.
*If 成員's "成員+" bonus was not able 至 activate，it is possible 為 that 成員 至 use other bonuses she may have。
- "成員 Bonus" 與 "成員 Bonus+" can be activated simultaneously.
_textEn:
・ In live， overall power up bonus does not activate.
・ Multiple bonus 成員 are activated only one bonus 與 highest effect value.
・ If there are multiple 成員 who have “成員+” bonus 於 unit，it is possible 為 one 成員 who is most effective 為 comprehensive power 與 event points 至 activate bonus.
* '成員+' bonus 的 overall force is only one 成員 who has highest value 當 multiplied 透過 comprehensive power 的 成員 與 effect value 的 '成員+' bonus。Activate.
* '成員+' bonus 的 event point activates only one 成員 who has highest effect 的 event points.
* Overall power 與 event point '成員 bonus +' may be activated 透過 different 成員.
* '成員+' Bonus，but not activated 成員 can activate another bonus.
・ 'Service bonus' 與 '成員 bonus+' can be activated at same time.
